title: Four men in original preview of 30
display_title: Four men in original preview of 30
wikitext:
[]: Four men in original preview of 3.0             Quote Post by Willynka » Fri Jul 10, 2015 7:40 am Is somebody able to identify the symbols in this frame of original preview at the end of 2.0? I am highly intrigued by those four shadows (imitanting four Adams?) in front of Kaworu.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Fri Jul 10, 2015 10:17 am Ultraman reference, ftw!

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Fri Jul 10, 2015 11:07 am Sachi wrote: Ultraman reference, ftw!

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Sat Jul 11, 2015 10:20 am 4 Reis(though I'd like to know what the symbol means too, especially after the 3.33 sorcery one)

[]:             Quote Post by ElMariachi » Sat Jul 11, 2015 10:33 am unitM wrote: 4 Reis(though I'd like to know what the symbol means too, especially after the 3.33 sorcery one)

[]:             Quote Post by Guy Nacks » Sat Jul 11, 2015 11:49 am ElMariachi wrote: The symbols were just a funny reference to Ultraman for the lulz, nothing more. The same way Shinji's ID card at the beginning of 1.0 had the USS Enterprise ID Code.

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Mon Jul 13, 2015 6:05 am unitM wrote: 4 Reis(though I'd like to know what the symbol means too, especially after the 3.33 sorcery one)

[]:             Quote Post by BlueBasilisk » Mon Jul 13, 2015 6:30 am We know from Fuyutsuki's scene in Q that there have been at least a dozen Reis between II and Q. And we still don't know if there even is an Adam-equivalent being in NTE or if the four Adams are of a similar nature.

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Mon Jul 13, 2015 9:19 am BlueBasilisk wrote: We know from Fuyutsuki's scene in Q that there have been at least a dozen Reis between II and Q. And we still don't know if there even is an Adam-equivalent being in NTE or if the four Adams are of a similar nature.

[]:             Quote Post by Sailor Star Dust » Mon Jul 13, 2015 10:30 am The draft for the Preview said they were the 4 Reis of varying ages (the AU School Uniform plus little ones we see in the Preview proper), though that cut was also in the draft. Should be discussed here somewhere: http://forum.evageeks.org/thread/11454/Eva-30-Q-Next-Time-Preview-Script-and-Images/

[]:             Quote Post by unitM » Mon Jul 13, 2015 9:50 pm I said it just because I'm sure a lot of us were thinking it.

[]:             Quote Post by Willynka » Tue Jul 21, 2015 7:07 am I feel like an idiot. After weekend EVA marathon I saw the preview again. Four shadows are probably four pilots including Mari.

[]:             Quote Post by Sicarius VI » Tue Jul 21, 2015 7:23 am ^ Either that which is what I always believed or 4 Reis as others are saying, I don't know how more than 1 Rei can be active at a time, but NTE could have changed it so it's possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Sachi » Thu Jul 23, 2015 4:30 am Sicarius VI wrote: ^ Either that which is what I always believed or 4 Reis as others are saying, I don't know how more than 1 Rei can be active at a time, but NTE could have changed it so it's possible.

[]:             Quote Post by Signer » Sat Jul 25, 2015 3:59 pm Narration at the moment of this frame talks about gathering of all children bound by fate. And the text after mentions SEELE's children. So, either children are officially gathered because Kaworu joins action and only him and Reis are Seele's children, or there are supposed to be nine children bound by fate - including these four Reis. That nicely corresponds to four missing evas and four closed coffins at the end of 1.0.

Article: Four men in original preview of 30
:59 pm Narration at the moment of this frame talks about gathering of all children bound by fate. And the text after mentions SEELE's children. So, either children are officially gathered because Kaworu joins action and only him and Reis are Seele's children, or there are supposed to be nine children bound by fate - including these four Reis. That nicely corresponds to four missing evas and four closed coffins at the end of 1.0.
